prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In a quiet corner of the ocean lived a shy octopus named Ollie. Ollie loved nothing more than hiding amongst his collection of colorful shells, watching the schools of fish swim by and the seahorses dance in the currents. But as much as Ollie enjoyed his solitary life, he couldn't shake the feeling that something was missing. All he wanted was to make a friend, someone who could share in his love of beautiful treasures and play with him in the coral reefs. But Ollie was afraid. His eight squishy arms felt too wiggly, his colorful skin too bright, and his big round eyes too big. So every time he got the courage to say hello, he would quickly curl up into a ball and hide. But today was different. Today, Ollie decided he would go on a quest to find his perfect friend, no matter how nervous he felt.
